intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Kowen, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Kowen (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra or ACT Remainder - Kowen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra has a flood risk score of 59/100, while ACT Remainder - Kowen scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. ACT Remainder - Kowen scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra or ACT Remainder - Kowen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. ACT Remainder - Jerrabomberra has a lower overall climate risk score.
